RipplePreview.description: Configuration for Ripple Preview (live block previews in the Umbraco backoffice).

DesignWidth.description: The viewport width (px) previews render at inside the preview iframe. Viewport-relative units (vw/vh) and media queries resolve against this width before the preview is scaled to fit. Default: 1440.

RichText.description: Rich Text Editor block preview settings.

Enabled.description: Whether previews are enabled for this editor type.

ContentTypes.description: Allowlist of element type aliases to render previews for. Empty = all element types.

IgnoredContentTypes.description: Element type aliases to exclude. Only applied when ContentTypes is empty.

ViewLocations.description: Additional view locations searched before the defaults. Use {0} as the alias placeholder, e.g. "/Views/Partials/myBlocks/{0}.cshtml".

Stylesheets.description: Stylesheet URLs injected into every preview document, e.g. "/css/site.css".

Scripts.description: Script URLs appended to every preview document, e.g. "/js/site.js".

WrapperView.description: Optional path to a wrapper partial rendered around the block markup (replicate grid chrome, page backgrounds). Receives the block item as model, inner markup via ViewData["rippleInnerHtml"], width fraction via ViewData["rippleWidthFraction"], the owning page via ViewData["rippleOwner"] and ancestor blocks via ViewData["rippleAncestors"].

FullAreaPreviewContentTypes.description: (Block Grid) element type aliases that render the full preview (children included) without the child editing strip. Children are edited through their own workspaces.

StackedAreaPreviewContentTypes.description: (Block Grid) element type aliases whose chrome previews on its own, with children rendered as individual previews below. By default, parents render one full-fidelity preview including children, with a compact editing strip underneath.
